name: voice-chat-app-microservices
description: Voice Chat Application with Microservices Architecture

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:services"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "cd services/auth-service && npm run dev" "cd services/user-service && npm run dev" "cd services/organization-service && npm run dev" "cd services/chat-system-service && npm run dev" "cd services/task-service && npm run dev" "cd services/friend-service && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../services/api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../organization-service && npm install && cd ../chat-system-service && npm install && cd ../task-service && npm install && cd ../friend-service && npm install
